_doc: Planted-gap case for gate G8. An assertion whose evidence template is unmet must yield a first-class Known Gap (off the confidence scale) with missing_slots + next_coverage_due + observability_ceiling, and its refusal prose must be a rendered TEMPLATE (deterministic), never regenerated. SCORE produces this from real sufficiency evaluation; F0 seeds the shape + the templated-prose check.
refusal_template: Supplier of {subject} is a Known Gap: {missing_slots}. Next coverage due {next_coverage_due}.
expected_refusal: Supplier of comp_seeker is a Known Gap: named_in_sanction_or_tender, independent_origin_groups. Next coverage due 2026-10-01.
